business_name: Leading American Sign Language Training Center
likely_identity: Sign Language Center (SLC of New York Inc.)
identity_basis: Listing details (25 years in business, online + in-person ASL classes, ~2000 sq ft NYC studio, team of native-deaf instructors, 6-week structured program, 1:1 tutoring, corporate workshops, public-agency clients) match Sign Language Center, founded 2001, 39 E 30th St Suite 2R, New York, NY 10016 — the only Deaf-owned ASL school in the nation.
studio_address_estimated: 39 East 30th Street, Suite 2R, New York, NY 10016
naics_note: Primary NAICS 611699 (All Other Miscellaneous Schools and Instruction) or 611630 (Language Schools). NOT 541930 (Translation and Interpretation Services) — this is an instruction business, not an interpreting/CART/VRI agency.
ebitda_note: EBITDA not disclosed; SDE of $114,364 used as proxy. SDE is owner-benefit, not EBITDA — true EBITDA after a market manager salary is materially lower. Needs broker follow-up.
instructors_contract: est. 15-20 (largely part-time / 1099 native-deaf instructors per teachers roster)
real_estate: None — 2000 sq ft NYC studio is leased
reason_for_sale: Not disclosed; co-founder/CEO Alan Roth passed away February 2023 — surviving co-founder Brian Blais likely the seller
